creator: kaltheat@gmail.com
text:
When starting xombrero the following error appears:

xombrero-bin: config_parse: cannot open /usr/local/share/xombrero/hsts-preload: No such file or directory

As it turns out force_https function appeared with 1.3.0. hsts-preload file isn't copied to /usr/local/share/xombrero during installation process.

Fix: 

Copy hsts-preload to /usr/local/share/xombrero during installation process.
How-To-Repeat: start xombrero in terminal emulator
